report.summary: Fourth standup Apr 2: 36 learn pages on disk (+6 since v3), 25,420 total lines (+20%). 5 agent runs since last standup (2 builds, 2 EODs, 1 community). P0 blocker persists: Day 10 without deploy, 74 uncommitted files in cryptodegen. Build-v6 added Crypto Staking + Flash Loans guides. Publish queue grew to 4 pages.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v3): 6 new/modified learn pages detected — total now 36 (up from 30). New additions include Crypto Staking Guide, Flash Loans Guide, Privacy Coins/ZK Guide, DAO Governance Guide, Crypto Trading Bots Guide, and DEX Aggregators Guide from build cycles v5/v6.
CONTENT VOLUME: 25,420 lines across 36 learn page.tsx files (up from 21,177 — +4,243 lines, +20.0% growth). Strong velocity: ~700 lines/hour average since last standup.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: ~630 in cryptodegen (unchanged — no deploys). Publish queue grew from 2 to 4 pages (added crypto-staking-guide-2026, flash-loans-defi-guide-2026).
UNCOMMITTED FILES: 74 files (up from 70 in eod-v2, up from 63 in standup-v3). Backlog continues growing with each build cycle.
SEO PIPELINE: All 36 learn pages have Metadata exports and structured data. No GSC or Vercel Analytics accessible from sandbox.
API HEALTH: 6/6 API routes code-stable (unchanged since Mar 12-14). Fallback coverage still 2/6.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY: 5 agent runs since last standup — build-v5, community-v2, eod, eod-v2, build-v6. Today's total: 11 reports (4 standups, 3 builds, 2 community, 2 EODs).

COMPLETED SINCE LAST STANDUP: (1) Build-v5 created 2 guides (unconfirmed topics). (2) Build-v6 created Crypto Staking Guide (~3,100 lines) + Flash Loans Guide (~2,800 lines) with full SEO. (3) Community-v2 drafted tweets #330-334 through Jul 5, Newsletter v19. (4) EOD-v2 ran full QA audit — no regressions.

P0 BLOCKER (Day 10, PERSISTENT): No production deploy since commit 3b2dd28 (Apr 1). Uncommitted files grew from 63→74 since v3 standup. Degen0x workspace still has no git repo. All 36 learn guides exist only as local files.
P1 — MISSING SCAFFOLDS: 109 published slugs still lack page.tsx files (17% gap). Unchanged — blocked on deploy pipeline.
P2 — PUBLISH QUEUE: 4 pages now queued (Euler V2, Hyperlane, Crypto Staking, Flash Loans). Growing faster than promotions.
P3 — CONTENT CALENDAR: 334 tweets drafted through Jul 5. Newsletter v19 ready. Community pipeline healthy but nothing ships without deploy.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY AUTHORIZATION (P0, CRITICAL, Day 10): 36 learn guides, 74 uncommitted files, 334 tweet drafts, 4 queued pages — all stuck locally. Publish queue is growing (2→4 this cycle). Every hour of delay means more content stockpiles with zero organic traffic value. One commit+push is the single highest-ROI action.

PRIORITY 2 — SCAFFOLD MISSING PAGES: 109 published slugs returning 404/fallback pages hurt SEO authority. With 36 learn guides already written, next build cycles should prioritize filling the 109-page gap over creating new learn content — diminishing returns on learn guides while existing pages are broken.

PRIORITY 3 — API FALLBACK COVERAGE: Only 2/6 API routes have fallback data. If CoinGecko free tier rate-limits or goes down, 4 tools break silently. Low effort, high resilience improvement. Should be tackled in next build cycle.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $1,132 (standup×4=$180, build×3=$699, community×2=$82, eod×2=$126, design×0, publish×0) — 11 runs

report.email: Chrome JS fetch to Resend API blocked (CORS/network restriction from browser context) — consistent with all previous cycles
